test.note: Pre-existing failures only: dsn-parser.test.ts fails due to missing DATABASE_URL env var, e2e.test.ts fails due to missing INBOUND_API_KEY. Unit tests that don't require external services (inbound-dedupe: 4 pass, rate-tracker: 3 pass) all pass. Same baseline as all prior milestones.

typecheck.note: Only 3 pre-existing errors: bun:test module declarations in test files (dsn-parser.test.ts, inbound-dedupe.test.ts, rate-tracker.test.ts). No new type errors introduced. Same baseline as all prior milestones.

lint.note: 315 pre-existing errors + 969 warnings across 651 files, all in content pages. No new lint errors introduced by this milestone. Same baseline as remove-autumn and replace-vercel milestones.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the assertCronAuthorized pattern for webhook endpoint auth: when adding cron-triggered webhook endpoints, include an assertCronAuthorized function that validates Authorization: Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}. Consider extracting to a shared utility (e.g., lib/webhooks/cron-auth.ts) since the pattern is now duplicated in two files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: app/api/webhooks/daily-usage/route.ts and app/api/webhooks/aws-stats-alert/route.ts contain identical assertCronAuthorized implementations. If future milestones add more cron endpoints, this duplication will grow.

rejectedObservations.observation: Pre-existing tsc errors (bun:test module resolution) should be documented in library
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in runtime-config, remove-autumn, and replace-vercel synthesis reports. Workers consistently discover and verify this baseline. Not worth a separate library entry — it's well-established context.

rejectedObservations.observation: Pre-existing lint errors (315 errors, 969 warnings) should be documented in library
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in all three prior milestone syntheses. Same baseline count across milestones. Workers know to verify by running lint on specific modified files.
